What entities are present and what are they doing on the sofa?
canonical_answer: A woman wearing a pink and white striped top sits with crossed legs on the left side of a brown leather sofa. Beside her, a man in a blue checkered shirt sits with hands clasped in his lap. Behind them, a floor lamp with a beige shade stands near white shelving units filled with books. They sit next to each other on the sofa.
